name: Kanaan Global School

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Kanaan Global is a good fit for Christian families in West Jakarta who want Cambridge qualifications with faith-based values.
paragraphs: Parents say Kanaan Global is a good fit for Christian families in West Jakarta who want Cambridge qualifications with faith-based values.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.1K – US$13K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: West Jakarta campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Chapel.
